title: Chainsaw Man Cosmetics
body:
This Pack adds custom model data to the game so that you can have custom items without loosing the original item that the pack would be replacing in this case Diamond Sword and Carved Pumpkin 

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/59Q12uuvIwc" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

(IMPORTANT)
If you want to obtain these in survival (without cheats) or in servers then go to (Versions) download Chainsaw Man RTP instead The diamond sword and Carved Pumpkin will be replaced with the Chainsaw Man Sword/Head.

If you dont want the diamond sword or carved pumpkin to be replaced then go to (Versions) and download Chainsaw Man Cosmetics (warning items can only be obtained with cheats if you pick this version 
to obtain custom item do 

/give @p minecraft:diamond_sword{CustomModelData:2} for (Chainsaw Man Sword)

/give @p minecraft:carved_pumpkin{CustomModelData:2} for (Chainsaw Man Head)


This pack is themed towards a anime called Chainsaw Man bringing the MC's Chainsaw arms and head into the game 

You may showcase the resource pack in any way only if you credit me. Share the resource pack with the Modrinth link. Use the resource pack on any server. Modify the resource pack for private use only!


You cant claim the resource pack as your own. Modify the resource pack for public use. Reupload any contents of the resource pack to anywhere. Showcase or share the resource pack without properly crediting the author.

if you dont like the custom home screen then just delete the gui file in Textures
